publicSideBand: The utility manages public-side replacement at no direct charge through its ongoing lead service line program
privateSideBand: Customer-owned lead and galvanized lines are being replaced at no direct cost to the customer
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement is described as no direct cost under the current Iowa American Water program
housingTypeAssumption: Iowa American Water publishes no-direct-cost program language and replacement progress rather than contractor bid ranges
permitAssumption: Eligibility depends on lead galvanized or unknown status identified through the map notices and ongoing replacement schedule
restorationAssumption: The utility coordinates outreach identification and replacement sequencing with customers
methodologySummary: Iowa American Water ties the cost page to its ongoing utility-run program and public progress update rather than to a contractor bid sheet and reports about 1300 completed customer-owned replacements by November 2024.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid direct cost only when Iowa American Water identifies the address through the map notice or self-report workflow and moves the property into the active replacement schedule.
